examples: How were we to know that he was a numbskull?
Because of this manual system, you could give whatever word you wanted for the booking - numbskull, code blue, Mrs Merton - and nobody cared.
Could it possibly be that we are such numb-nuts that we couldn’t figure it out for ourselves and God, Himself, had slap us upside the head and tell the numbskull in us to love our wives?
